name: clone-anywhere-for-github
description: A Chrome extension that clones any GitHub repo into VS Code, Cursor, Windsurf, VSCodium, or Insiders — or downloads it as a .zip, straight from the repo page.

scripts.build: npm run bundle && node scripts/build-manifest.mjs && cp popup.html popup.css dist/ && cp -r icons dist/
scripts.package: npm run build && cd dist && zip -r "../clone-anywhere-for-github-v$npm_package_version.zip" .

author: AdamAkhlaq
